name: Patient Case
history: History of recurring conflicts and strained relationships. Ongoing trust and boundary issues in relationships. Some relationships involve alcoholism. History of aggressive behavior.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
I am bound to be abandoned
intermediate_belief: If I let people in, I will get hurt.
intermediate_belief_depression: I can't trust anyone, so I will always be alone.
coping_strategies: Avoidance of reconnecting with people who have caused harm.
situation: Considering reconnecting with an estranged person who previously caused harm. Deciding not to reconnect as a self-protective choice.
auto_thought: If I reconnect, I will be hurt again.
behavior: Avoidance of reconnecting with the estranged person.
